FLOW.COMMENT: All required Field validations for all PrtyTypes and CustomerTypes

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: All required Field validations for all PrtyTypes and CustomerTypes
Always check these required fields for null and blanks
Guarantor and CutomerType="IND" Required field Checks
Guarantor and Lessee ONLY Required field Checks

Values.value: is a required Field. Key in a valid data.
The xml from ExpressOs is validated successfully for the required fields.
